title: Amtech D0935 150mm (6'') Ratchet Speed clamp

NON-MARKING: Strong and lightweight with nylon fibre-filled jaws, it has non-marking clamp pads
SIZE CAPACITY: 150mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
PRECISION CUTTING: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential tool for household and trade pipework
